case_title: BENNETT, KAREN et al VS ANDERSON, MARSHALL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,342.00 FILED BY BENNETT, KAREN ELLER, JORDAN RUSSELL, NICOLE AS TO DEFENDANT ANDERSON, MARSHALL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-02-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ANDERSON, MARSHALL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BENNETT, KAREN ELLER, JORDAN RUSSELL, NICOLE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANDERSON, MARSHALL $3,342.00 PRINCIPAL, $48.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,390.00, PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE ON THE 1ST AND 15TH OF THE MONTH IN THE AMOUNT OF $200 UNTIL AMT PAID IN FULL STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR BENNETT, KAREN ELLER, JORDAN RUSSELL, NICOLE ASSIGNED TO CYRUS KILLEN
WRIT RETURNED TO ASSIGNEE OF JUDGMENT CYRUS KILLEN WITH INFORMATION AND FORM TO SET ASIDE TERMS;
PETITION OF JUDGMENT CREDITOR TO SET ASIDE TERMS FOR PAYMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BENNETT, KAREN ELLER, JORDAN RUSSELL, NICOLE PETITION MAILED ON MAR 23, 2000
ORDER TO SET ASIDE TERMS FILED BY PLAINTIFF BENNETT, KAREN ELLER, JORDAN RUSSELL, NICOLE
ORDER TO SET ASIDE TERMS TO MARSHALL ANDERSON RETURNED ---UNDELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED;
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $400.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $200.00 ACCRUED INTEREST, $99.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT ANDERSON, MARSHALL
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ANDERSON, MARSHALL
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT ANDERSON, MARSHALL
